blended.narrative: Pine Knob is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 63°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 59°F.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 53°F.
